title: Symbol Inventory Record
description: One extracted item from either side. Files are symbols too (qualname=""), so a single table answers both file-level and symbol-level questions.

version.description: Upstream commit/release this was extracted at; "working" for the live target tree.

sig_hash.description: Hash of the normalized signature — cheap signature-drift detection.

body_hash.description: Hash of the symbol's source text — behavioral-change signal.
